title: chore(deps): update babel monorepo
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [@babel/cli](https://babeljs.io/) ([source](https://togithub.com/babel/babel)) | devDependencies | minor | [`7.5.5` -> `7.6.4`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@babel%2fcli/7.5.5/7.6.4) |
| [@babel/core](https://babeljs.io/) ([source](https://togithub.com/babel/babel)) | devDependencies | minor | [`7.5.5` -> `7.6.4`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@babel%2fcore/7.5.5/7.6.4) |
| [@babel/plugin-transform-react-constant-elements](https://togithub.com/babel/babel) | devDependencies | minor | [`7.5.0` -> `7.6.3`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@babel%2fplugin-transform-react-constant-elements/7.5.0/7.6.3) |
| [@babel/preset-env](https://babeljs.io/) ([source](https://togithub.com/babel/babel)) | devDependencies | minor | [`7.5.5` -> `7.6.3`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@babel%2fpreset-env/7.5.5/7.6.3) |
| [@babel/preset-react](https://babeljs.io/) ([source](https://togithub.com/babel/babel)) | devDependencies | minor | [`7.0.0` -> `7.6.3`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@babel%2fpreset-react/7.0.0/7.6.3) |
| [@babel/preset-typescript](https://togithub.com/babel/babel) | devDependencies | minor | [`7.3.3` -> `7.6.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@babel%2fpreset-typescript/7.3.3/7.6.0) |
| [babel-eslint](https://togithub.com/babel/babel-eslint) | devDependencies | patch | [`10.0.2` -> `10.0.3`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/babel-eslint/10.0.2/10.0.3) |

<details>
<summary>babel/babel-eslint</summary>

### [`v10.0.3`](https://togithub.com/babel/babel-eslint/releases/v10.0.3)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/babel/babel-eslint/compare/v10.0.2...v10.0.3)

Fixes [#​791](https://togithub.com/babel/babel-eslint/issues/791), also [eslint/eslint#​12117](https://togithub.com/eslint/eslint/issues/12117)

Some context: [#​793 (comment)](https://togithub.com/babel/babel-eslint/pull/793#issuecomment-524435971)

We ended up going with [@​JLHwung](https://togithub.com/JLHwung)'s PR [#​794](https://togithub.com/babel/babel-eslint/pull/794) which uses ESLint's deps instead of going with peerDeps since it really depends on the version being used and we don't want users to have to install it directly on their own.

babel-eslint is patching patches of the dependencies of ESLint itself so these kinds of issues have happened in the past. We'll need to look into figuring out how to have a more solid way of modifying behavior instead of this monkeypatching type of thing for future releases.

</details>
